descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had major confrontations with La Gloriosa, the barra brava of San Lorenzo de Almagro.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of ... San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa)

descriptions: Organized Chaos MC is a Bandidos support club.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandidos members Ballardo Salcido and Daniel Villalobos, and Organized Chaos MC (a Bandidos support club) vice-president Juan Miguel Vega-Rivera were also shot in what began as a bar brawl between the two groups.

Shirt Tails.description: The Shirt Tails were a mid-19th-century street gang based in the Five Points slum in Manhattan, New York City. They wore their shirts outside their pants as a form of insignia and concealed weapons beneath. Active from the 1830s to the 1860s, they participated in the New York Draft Riots as part of a coalition under the Dead Rabbits. The gang disappeared shortly before the American Civil War.

descriptions: Infobox lists Shirt Tails as rivals of Bowery Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Dead Rabbits, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Shirt Tails, Chichesters, Tammany Hall

descriptions: Shirt Tails listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians

descriptions: The infobox lists Shirt Tails as an ally of the Forty Thieves.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters , Shirt Tails , Kerryonians , Dead Rabbits , Tammany Hall

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Chichesters, Dead Rabbits, Tammany Hall

descriptions: Atlantic Guards listed as rival of Shirt Tails in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards

descriptions: Shirt Tails fought against the Bowery Boys during the New York Draft Riots.
edges.evidence_quote: they did participate in a coalition of gangs under the Dead Rabbits and fought against the Bowery Boys during the New York Draft Riots

descriptions: Shirt Tails participated in a coalition led by Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: they did participate in a coalition of gangs under the Dead Rabbits and fought against the Bowery Boys during the New York Draft Riots

edges.evidence_quote: The Kadyrovites ended up backing down in that confrontation when another Chechen warlord, Said-Magomed Kakiev, head of the Spetsnaz GRU unit the Special Battalion Zapad, came down on Baisarov's side.

descriptions: The Basile-Calvano clan allied with the Pino-Sena faction.

Elm Street Piru.description: The Elm Street Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods alliance. It originated in Compton, California, and has since spread to other parts of the United States, including Brooklyn, Atlanta, and Virginia. The gang is primarily African-American and has been involved in criminal activities such as recruiting high school students, conspiracy to murder a witness, and a fatal shooting during protests.

descriptions: Cedar Block Piru is listed as an ally of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cedar Block Piru , Fruit Town Piru , Tree Top Piru

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cedar Block Piru , Fruit Town Piru , Tree Top Piru

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: South Side Compton Crips , Kelly Park Compton Crips , Santana Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: Elm Street Piru is a set within the Piru gang alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Elm Street Piru (also known as the Elm Street Piru Bloods ) are a " set " of the Piru gang alliance

descriptions: Santana Blocc Compton Crips is listed as a rival of Elm Street Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: South Side Compton Crips , Kelly Park Compton Crips , Santana Blocc Compton Crips

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: South Side Compton Crips , Kelly Park Compton Crips , Santana Blocc Compton Crips

descriptions: Matranga family extorted and intimidated Provenzano family, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: They eventually began moving in on Provenzano fruit loading operations intimidating them with threats of violence.

descriptions: The Matranga family was the predecessor to the New Orleans crime family; Matranga ruled until Carollo took over in early 1920s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Matranga crime family, established by Charles (1857 – October 28, 1943) and Antonio (Tony) Matranga (d. 1890), was one of the earliest recorded American Mafia crime families, operating in New Orleans during the late 19th century until the beginning of Prohibition in 1920.

descriptions: Seinen Shiso Kenkyukai was a sub-faction within Zen'ai Kaigi.
edges.evidence_quote: In April 1961, Kodama formed his own sub-faction within the Zen'ai Kaigi called Seinen Shiso Kenkyukai

descriptions: The Alameddines and Elmirs are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: This suggests that the Alameddines and Elmirs are still allies.

descriptions: The Elmir and Ahmad families were at war starting in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: The war began when Safwan Charbaji, a relative of Steven Elmir, was shot to death at a smash-repair shop by Walid 'Wally' Ahmad in April 2016.

descriptions: Mejid Hamzy was the key suspect in the murder of Hamad Assad, an Elmir associate.
edges.evidence_quote: Mejid Hamzy was the key suspect in his murder.

'Ndrina Gaglianesi.description: The 'Ndrina Gaglianesi is a 'Ndrangheta crime family based in Catanzaro, Italy. It operates in various neighborhoods of Catanzaro, controlling criminal activities through a hierarchical structure. Key figures include Girolamo Costanzo, Anselmo Di Bona, and Lorenzo Iiritano. The organization has been active since at least the 1990s, with members arrested in operations such as Falco-Ghibli in 1993.

descriptions: Gaglianesi is listed as an ally of Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Gaglianesi

descriptions: Girolamo Costanzo, a leader of the Gaglianesi, is also the referent for the Arena clan, indicating a cooperative link.
edges.evidence_quote: Girolamo Costanzo, capo e referente degli Arena.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Giacobbe is allied with the Cosca dei Gaglianesi.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Giacobbi è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della zona di Borgia alleata con la Cosca dei Gaglianesi in Calabria .

descriptions: Younger Gooch Close is a rival of Doddington per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gooch Close Gang , Younger Gooch Close , Cheetham Hill Gang , Longsight Street Soldiers , Pit Bull Crew , Fallowfield Mad Dogs , Old Trafford Crips , Rusholme Crew Gangsters

descriptions: National Islamic Unity Party split from Islamic Unity Party.
edges.evidence_quote: One of these was Ustad Muhammad Akbari, a Shia Hazara politician who separated from Abdul-Ali Mazari's Islamic Unity Party to form the National Islamic Unity Party

Soldiers of Aryan Culture.description: A large white supremacist prison gang in the United States, founded in 1997 by Tracy David 'Tinman' Swena in Utah. The gang operates both inside and outside prisons, engaging in drug trafficking, extortion, violence, and other crimes. It has a paramilitary structure and requires members to attack sex offenders and informants. The SAC is known for its anti-Semitic ideology and has spread across multiple states and the federal prison system.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang has a rivalry with Soldiers of Aryan Culture.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Soldiers of Aryan Culture

descriptions: An Aryan Brotherhood affiliate influenced SAC's founder to start the gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Tracy had been influenced to establish a white power group after an Aryan Brotherhood affiliate introduced him to white supremacist literature sometime in the mid-to-late 1990s.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang is listed as a rival of SAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños , Big Circle Gang

descriptions: Krieger Verwandt is listed as an ally of SAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Krieger Verwandt , Silent Aryan Warriors

descriptions: SAC and Noble Elect Thugs were charged together in a drug and firearms distribution case.
edges.evidence_quote: 21 members of the SAC, Silent Aryan Warriors, and Noble Elect Thugs were charged in Utah with distribution of drugs

descriptions: Norteños is listed as a rival of SAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños , Big Circle Gang

descriptions: SAC and Silent Aryan Warriors jointly planned a bomb plot against Jewish athletes.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the group, along with members of the Silent Aryan Warriors (another white supremacist prison gang), allegedly planned to attack Jewish athletes at the 2002 Winter Olympics

descriptions: SAC and Silent Aryan Warriors were charged together in a drug and firearms distribution case.

Los Priscos.description: Colombian criminal group affiliated with the Medellín Cartel, active in the 1980s and early 1990s. Named after the four Prisco Lopera brothers, they functioned as the armed wing of the Medellín Cartel, carrying out assassinations ordered by Pablo Escobar. The group was dismantled in 1991 when its leaders were killed by police.

descriptions: Los Priscos were affiliated with and acted as the armed wing of the Medellín Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Priscos were a criminal group affiliated with the Medellín Cartel in Colombia.

descriptions: Los Priscos is listed as an ally of Medellín Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Guadalajara Cartel (defunct) , The Extraditables (defunct) , La Corporación (defunct) , Oficina de Envigado , Los Priscos (defunct) , Gallón Gang (defunct) , Galician clans , Gulf Cartel , Nicaragua (alleged) , Cuba (alleged) , Panama (alleged, under Manuel Noriega )

'Ndrina Cataldo.description: The Cataldo 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Locri, Calabria, Italy, founded in the 1960s. It is involved in drug trafficking and has been engaged in a long blood feud with the Cordì 'ndrina. The clan has allied with the Marafioti family and the De Stefano 'ndrina, and has been involved in cocaine trafficking from Colombia. It remains active as of the present.

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Cataldo 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Cataldo was part of a joint venture with Barbaro for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina

descriptions: Cataldo and Cordì are in a blood feud.
edges.evidence_quote: involved in a long blood feud with the Cordì 'ndrina

descriptions: Cataldo and Cordi were opposing sides in the Faida di Locri.
edges.evidence_quote: Da allora le cosche Cataldo e Cordi si sono combattute a più riprese fino agli arresti compiuti nel 1999

descriptions: The Cataldo are historical rivals of the Cordì.
edges.evidence_quote: storici rivali dei Cordì

descriptions: After a truce, they formed an alliance for joint crime management.
edges.evidence_quote: they formed a strong alliance aimed at a joint management of the crime business

descriptions: The Floccari split from the Cataldo to form their own 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Alla fine degli anni '90 i Floccari si staccano dai Cataldo formando una 'ndrina a sé.

descriptions: Cataldo was part of a joint venture with Ierinò for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the ... Ierinò 'ndrina

descriptions: After a long feud, the two clans formed an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cordì and Cataldo clans signed a peace after a bitter feud that lasted for 40 years causing dozens of deaths. They formed a strong alliance

descriptions: A peace was signed with the Cataldo in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2010 dopo ben oltre quarant'anni dall'omicidio di Domenico Cordì nel 1967 sembra si sia siglata una pace con i Cataldo.
